creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Mar 18, 2010 at 10:10:16AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/phprecipebook,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/144851 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/144851

I made an error in compiling the PR.

The correct "From" line is mad@madpilot.net. And I'm in fact the port
maintainer. Sorry for the inconvenience.

-- 
Guido Falsi <mad@madpilot.net>
